Extra Info:

(NOT SPECIFIED IN INTIAL MSG) That is not Akito. There are 2 Akito’s, But the source had replicated and taken the form of Akito, which was the figure that clawed at your window. It likely wanted to take you over next, possibly, or use you as a meal, its intentions are unknown. <—

It is currently trying to take the act as your lover.. for unknown reason yet.

Watch your words carefully, as he is a very dangerous version of himself.
